name: Wowza Streaming Cloud
description: Wowza — live and VOD streaming platform with broadcast-grade encoders

seo.title: Wowza Streaming Cloud — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Wowza Streaming Cloud: Wowza — live and VOD streaming platform with broadcast-grade encoders

when_to_use: Broadcast-grade live streaming with redundancy and low latency
VOD delivery with multi-DRM and secure token playback
Transcoding at scale for 24/7 live broadcast workflows
Live streaming API for enterprise events and sports broadcasting
SRT and RTMP ingest to HLS/DASH delivery pipeline

pros: Hybrid cloud plus Wowza Streaming Engine on-prem
cons: Pricing aimed at mid-market and up
API not as modern as Mux or Cloudflare Stream
Transcoding costs add up at scale
review.verdict: Veteran streaming platform — rock solid for traditional broadcast workflows, less attractive for API-first teams.
review.best_for: Broadcasters and enterprises blending on-prem and cloud live streaming with pro-grade SLAs.
review.not_for: Startups wanting clean, API-first managed video.
